prompt: A dreamy pastel anime illustration of a serene young woman in a moonlit spring garden beside a pond, rendered in delicate Japanese fantasy style with flat anime coloring, no shadows, ultra-clean linework, and no grainy texture. She is seated in three-quarter back view at the water’s edge, turning her face slightly toward the viewer with a calm, melancholic expression. She has very long straight silver-white hair with soft bangs and floral ornaments woven into a blossom crown. She wears an elegant flowing kimono in pale blue and cream, richly patterned with stylized waves and white foxes, with layered fabric pooling around her. A large traditional paper parasol rests behind her on the right side, partly open, with dangling crystal-like ornaments. Surround her with dense blooming cherry blossom branches overhead and scattered petals in the foreground. The pond is filled with exactly 10 glowing lotus flowers floating on reflective water and exactly 4 visible koi fish swimming near the surface. In the distant left background, include a small multi-tier pagoda silhouette across the water. From the upper left, a soft rainbow beam of light descends diagonally onto the pond, creating iridescent reflections. Hang several faceted crystal ornaments from the branches so they sparkle in the light. Use a palette dominated by lavender, blush pink, pale blue, ivory, and soft gold. The atmosphere should feel ethereal, romantic, tranquil, and magical, with intricate decorative detail, luminous water reflections, and a polished vertical composition.
